patterns.name: Slack Bot Token
patterns.risk: Can read messages, post as the bot, access channels, and download files.

patterns.name: Slack User Token
patterns.risk: Can act as the user — read DMs, post messages, access private channels.
patterns.fix: Use SLACK_USER_TOKEN environment variable. Prefer bot tokens over user tokens.

patterns.name: Slack Incoming Webhook URL
patterns.risk: Can post messages to a specific Slack channel.

patterns.name: Discord Bot Token
patterns.risk: Full control of the Discord bot — can read/send messages, manage servers.

patterns.name: Discord Webhook URL
patterns.risk: Can post messages and embeds to a specific Discord channel.

patterns.name: Twilio Auth Token
patterns.risk: Can send SMS/calls, access call logs, and incur charges.

patterns.name: SendGrid API Key
patterns.risk: Can send emails from your domain. Attacker can send phishing emails as you.

patterns.name: Mailgun API Key
patterns.risk: Can send emails, manage domains, and access logs.

patterns.name: Telegram Bot Token
patterns.risk: Full control of the Telegram bot — read messages, send messages, manage groups.
false_positive_hints: High false positive rate — verify the surrounding context mentions Telegram or bot
